title: ArmingGrant
description: A steering grant over a live session. Source: POST /api/coders/{key}/arm result + GET /api/coders/steering/grants entries (holdspeak/coder_steering.py, Phase 87). The consent spine: watching is free, steering is armed; the grant pins the pane's %N identity and counts down.

pane_id.description: tmux %N unique id, pinned at arm time
